debug_info.goal:
cey : CompressedEdwardsY
⊢ ∃ result,
    cey.decompress = ok result ∧
      ∀ (ep : EdwardsPoint),
        result = some ep →
          let y_encoded := U8x32_as_Nat cey % 2 ^ 255;
          let x_sign_bit := (↑cey[31]!).testBit 7;
          ∃ Z_inv x_val y_val x_is_neg,
            field.FieldElement51.invert ep.Z = ok Z_inv ∧
              Field51_as_Nat ep.X * Field51_as_Nat Z_inv % p = x_val ∧
                Field51_as_Nat ep.Y * Field51_as_Nat Z_inv % p = y_val ∧
                  field.FieldElement51.is_negative ep.X = ok x_is_neg ∧
                    y_val * y_val % p = (x_val * x_val + 1 + d * x_val * x_val * y_val * y_val) % p ∧
                      y_val % p = y_encoded % p ∧
                        (x_sign_bit = true ↔ x_is_neg.val = 1#u8) ∧
                          Field51_as_Nat ep.T % p = Field51_as_Nat ep.X * Field51_as_Nat ep.Y % p

unfold edwards.CompressedEdwardsY.decompress
  progress as ⟨y, hy⟩; progress as ⟨y2, hy2⟩; progress as ⟨u, hu⟩; progress as ⟨dv, hdv⟩
  progress as ⟨dy2, hdy2⟩; progress as ⟨v, hv⟩; progress as ⟨res, hres⟩
  cases res with | mk is_square x =>
  simp only [Option.map, Result.ok.injEq]; split <;> try { simp; rfl }
  progress as ⟨x_is_neg, hx_is_neg⟩; progress as ⟨neg_x, hneg_x⟩; progress as ⟨xf, hxf⟩
  progress as ⟨xf_is_neg, hxf_is_neg⟩; progress as ⟨one, hone⟩; progress as ⟨t, ht⟩
  refine ⟨some _, rfl, ?_⟩; intro ep h_ep; injection h_ep; subst ep
  progress as ⟨one_inv, hinv⟩
  use one_inv, Field51_as_Nat xf, Field51_as_Nat y, xf_is_neg
  simp [*, Field51_as_Nat_one] at *
  repeat' split_ands <;> try progress <;> try simp [*, Field51_as_Nat_one] at *
  · simp [Field51_as_Nat_mul, Field51_as_Nat_add, Field51_as_Nat_sub, Field51_as_Nat_sqr, *] at *
    have : (Field51_as_Nat xf * Field51_as_Nat xf * Field51_as_Nat v) % p = Field51_as_Nat u % p := by
      simp [←hxf, Field51_as_Nat_neg, *]
    simp [←this]; ring
  · simp [hy]
  · simp [←hxf_is_neg, ←hx_is_neg, ←hxf]; cases x_is_neg <;> simp [*]
